text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky is training hard for the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahh! This brisk air is the best! It makes running a breeze!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The race is coming soon, so I'm all amped up!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
When I think about who my next opponents are
going to be, I get so excited I can't stand still!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, look over there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass, you're amazing! You've broken your own
record again!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad to see that my training is paying
off!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Me next! Time t'get serious!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My rivals are working super hard so they can
compete with me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
To keep them motivated, I really need to meet
their expectations!
choice_data_list: Show them what their role model can do!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Absitively posolutely!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do one more lap! Time to get amped
to the max!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, Maruzensky continues to watch the
early-year students.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! They're working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It touches my heart to see how much these
adorable athletes have grown up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Continuing to chase your dreams in the face of
adversity can be difficult for any Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, seeing your ideal self running right in
front of you is just about the best motivation you
can have.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It would seem that you've become an excellent
guide for the novice students, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, that's high praise!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I've been trying to become a role
model for others to follow...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But that's just because I want to get a kick out of
running with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You wish to set an example so you can enjoy
running...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For myself, my ambition to lead all Umamusume
forward is what keeps me going.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But with you, I can't help wanting to run for a
different purpose.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Really? What would that be?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's simple, really. The fundamental drive of all
runners...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I want to know which one of us will come out in
front.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You know what—I'm curious too! And I can't
wait to find out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's exactly how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sorry about calling you so suddenly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sorry about calling you so suddenly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I heard about a hot Italian restaurant where all
the hippest kids hang, so I thought maybe we
could go check it out—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that big crowd headed this way?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky! Can you answer a few questions
about your upcoming showdown at the Osaka
Hai?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: How confident are you that you can win?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
W-wait! Slow down! I can't think when I'm getting
bombarded like this!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
We've heard that Symboli Rudolf is also going to
run in the Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: R-really? Trainer, did you know about this?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: R-really? Trainer, did you know about this?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
The media is already abuzz with the news! How do
you feel about it?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, I mean, isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If you guys are all this excited about it, then how could us runners not be super hyped up?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Sorry for changing plans so
abruptly, but instead of getting Italian...
choice_data_list: You want to train for the showdown, right?
You want to train for the showdown, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Sorry for changing plans so
abruptly, but instead of getting Italian...
choice_data_list: You want to train for the showdown, right?
You want to train for the showdown, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I want to make this the best race
ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai, and the anticipated showdown
with "Emperor" Symboli Rudolf, is finally here!
